title: Pre-Flight Validation & Command Timeouts
requirements:
Eliminate silent failures from missing tools, bad config, and hanging operations.

1. Create scripts/preflight.sh that validates:
   - All required tools installed and on PATH: git, gh, node, npm, gitleaks
   - gh auth status returns authenticated
   - .env exists and contains all required vars (AGENT_EMPLOYEE_CODE, JIRA_URL, etc.)
   - AGENT_EMPLOYEE_CODE is exactly 3 lowercase letters
   - repos.json exists and is valid JSON
   - For the target repo: directory exists, is a git repo, has remote origin
   - Jira reachable (curl check returns 200/401/403)
   - Output: JSON with overall (pass/fail) + checks[] (name, status, error)
   - Exit 0 on pass, exit 1 on any failure

2. Create scripts/with-timeout.sh wrapper:
   - Args: <timeout_seconds> <command...>
   - Uses timeout (GNU coreutils) on Linux, gtimeout on macOS, Start-Process fallback on Windows/MSYS
   - On timeout: kill process tree, log to run.log, exit 124
   - Env var override: AGENT_COMMAND_TIMEOUT (default 300s for tests, 120s for tsc, 60s for lint)
   - Output: passthrough stdout/stderr from wrapped command

3. Integrate timeouts into existing scripts:
   - Update regression-guard.sh: wrap npx tsc --noEmit, npm test in with-timeout.sh
   - Update worktree-init.sh: wrap npm install in with-timeout.sh
   - Update orphan-check.sh: wrap grep operations in with-timeout.sh (30s default)
   - Update run-secret-scan.sh: wrap gitleaks in with-timeout.sh
   - Add timeout events to notify.sh event type map (icon: clock, severity: ERROR)
   - Log all timeout events to run.log via run-log.sh

4. Update CLAUDE.md startup sequence:
   - Insert preflight as mandatory step 1 (before parse-args)
   - On preflight failure: log error, notify human, abort run
   - Update script reference table with preflight.sh and with-timeout.sh

5. Write tests for all new functionality:
   - Test preflight with all tools present (expect pass)
   - Test preflight with missing tool (expect fail + clear error)
   - Test preflight with missing .env var (expect fail + identifies which var)
   - Test with-timeout.sh with fast command (expect passthrough)
   - Test with-timeout.sh with sleep 10 and 2s timeout (expect kill + exit 124)
   - Test regression-guard.sh timeout integration
acceptance_criteria: scripts/preflight.sh exists and validates all required tools, auth, env vars, repos.json, and target repo
preflight.sh outputs JSON with overall pass/fail and individual check results
scripts/with-timeout.sh exists and works cross-platform (Linux timeout, macOS gtimeout, Windows/MSYS fallback)
with-timeout.sh kills process tree on timeout and exits 124
regression-guard.sh wraps tsc and test commands in with-timeout.sh
worktree-init.sh wraps npm install in with-timeout.sh
orphan-check.sh wraps grep operations in with-timeout.sh
CLAUDE.md startup sequence includes preflight as step 1
Script reference table updated with new scripts
